question_text: A sound wave has a frequency of 500 Hz. What does this tell you about the sound?

options.label: B
options.text: The sound vibrates 500 times per second and would have a high pitch

options.label: C
options.text: The sound travels 500 metres per second

options.label: D
options.text: The sound is moving through water, not air

explanation: Frequency is how many vibrations happen per second. A higher frequency like 500 Hz means more vibrations and a higher pitch sound. Lower frequencies produce lower pitched sounds.
